warmup_steps = min(max(total_steps // 10, 1), total_steps // 2)\\n    cosine_steps = max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1)\\n    warmup = optim.lr_scheduler.LinearLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        start_factor=0.2,\\n        end_factor=1.0,\\n        total_iters=warmup_steps,\\n    )\\n    cosine = optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=cosine_steps)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.SequentialLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        schedulers=[warmup, cosine],\\n        milestones=[warmup_steps],\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed-step budget more effectively by enabling a warmup+cosine schedule tied to TRAIN_MAX_STEPS, paired with AdamW and a slightly larger learning rate/batch size to improve optimization progress within 256 steps.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\",\"micro\"]}"}}
